line_1: In youth and beauty to thy cold death-bed;
line_2: Even whilst on dreams of bliss we fondly fed,

line_1: Pass like a shade, pointing to thy death-bed,
line_2: That withers at his feet! — Lift up thy head,

line_1: Pass like a shade, pointing to thy death-bed,
line_2: That book declares whose blood for thee was shed,

line_1: Pass like a shade, pointing to thy death-bed,
line_2: And by his guiding hand thy steps to heaven are led!
